rankings.title: How Venture Capitalists Actually Make Money (Explained by a VC)
summary_bullets: VCs earn guaranteed fees from management.
Funds charge 2% annual fee, 20% profits.
VCs need “fund returners” to succeed.
Most VC returns come from top investments.
VCs prioritize raising larger funds for fees.
rankings.display_title: How Venture Capitalists Actually Make Money (Explained by a VC)

rankings.title: How to get a VC (like me) to wire you $2M in under 2 weeks
summary_bullets: Build list of 50 qualified VCs.
Engineer intros through trusted sources.
Compress timeline by scheduling all meetings same week.
Use FOMO tactics like “you’re not alone” hints.
Avoid setting valuation or fake deadlines.
